brand: Te Paipera i te Panui Kotahi
docTitle: Te Paipera i te Panui Kotahi · Mai i te Hanganga ki te Hāhi

share.title: Te Paipera i te Panui Kotahi
share.text: I te panui kotahi, kitea te kōrero nui o te Paipera — me te take i haere mai ai a Īhu.

ui.christLabel: E tohu ana ki a Īhu

epochs.title: Te Hanganga
epochs.one: I hangaia e te Atua he ao i “tino pai rawa atu”.
epochs.people: Te Atua; a Arama rāua ko Iwi
epochs.events: Ngā rā e ono o te hanganga, te tangata i hangaia kia rite ki te āhua o te Atua, te okiokinga o te hāpati
epochs.q: He mea hanga nā te Atua i te tīmatanga te rangi me te whenua,
epochs.christ: I hangaia te ao mā te “Kupu”. E kī ana te Rongopai a Hoani ko taua Kupu ko Īhu tonu (Hoani 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Kāhore te Paipera e tīmata ki te tautohe whakaaro, engari ki te kī: “He mea hanga nā te Atua i te tīmatanga…” Ehara te ao i te mea pohehe, engari he mahi nā tētahi Atua whaiwhakaaro.

  • Te āhua o te Atua · o ngā mea ora katoa, ko te tangata anake i hangaia kia rite ki te Atua — kia mōhio ki a ia, kia tiaki i te ao.
  • Okiokinga · ko te okiokinga o te rā tuawhitu e whakaatu ana kua oti katoa, kua mau te rangimārie (shalom): “he pai”.
  • Erene · te ao i mua i tōna pakaru, i reira a te Atua me te tangata e haere tahi ana.
epochs.next: Engari kua tata pakaru tēnei oranga tonu…

epochs.tag: KAWENATA TAWHITO · KA TĪMATA TE RARU
epochs.title: Te Hinganga
epochs.one: I uru mai te hara, ā, i motuhia te here i waenga i te tangata me te Atua.
epochs.people: A Arama rāua ko Iwi; te nākahi (Hātana)
epochs.events: Te kainga o te hua i rāhuitia, te peinga atu i Erene, te taenga mai o te mate me te whakauaua
epochs.q: Ka whakatupuria hoki e ahau he pakanga mā kōrua ko te wahine… ka marū tōu mātenga i a ia,
epochs.christ: Ko te oati tuatahi o te rongopai, i homai i muri tonu o te Hinganga: ka kuru “te uri o te wahine” i te māhunga o te nākahi — ko Īhu tērā (Kenehi 3:15; Rōma 16:20; Karatia 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Mā te tūtūtanga o te hiahia kia “rite ki te Atua”, ka uru mai te hara ki te ao. Ehara te hua i te tūtūtanga ture noa, engari he here kua pakaru.

  • Ngā here pakaru · ki te Atua (te huna), ki tētahi ki tētahi (te whakapae), ki te ao tūroa (ngā tātaramoa me te whakauaua).
  • Mate · ka tutuki te whakatūpato “ka tino mate koe”.
  • Kenehi 3:15 · heoi, i waenganui i te whakawā, ka homai tuatahi te oati o te whakaoranga. E kīia ana e ngā mātauranga ko te protoevangelium (te rongopai tuatahi).
epochs.next: Ināianei ka karangahia e te Atua tētahi tangata kotahi hei tīmata i te whakaoranga…

epochs.title: Ngā Tūpuna
epochs.date: c. 2000 i mua i a te Karaiti
epochs.one: Ka oati te Atua ki a Āperahama, “Ka waiho koe hei awa manaaki.”
epochs.events: Te kawenata o Āperahama, te herenga o Ihaka, ngā tama tekau mā rua a Hākopa, te pikinga o Hōhepa ki te mana i Īhipa
epochs.q: Ā, ka meinga koe e ahau hei iwi nui… ā, māu ka manaakitia ai ngā hapū katoa o te whenua.
epochs.christ: Ka tutuki te oati “ka manaakitia ngā iwi katoa” i roto i a Īhu, te uri o Āperahama (Karatia 3:16).
epochs.detail:
Ka tīmata te Atua ki te whakatika i te raru o te tangata katoa mā te karanga i te tangata kotahi, a Āperahama. Ko te ngako ko te kawenata (te oati) — he iwi nui, he whenua, me te “manaaki mō ngā iwi katoa”.

  • Whakapono · i whakapono a Āperahama ki te oati e kore e kitea, ā, i kīia he tika tērā mōna (Kenehi 15:6).
  • Ihaka rāua ko Hākopa · ka tukua te oati ki muri; ko Hākopa (Īharaira) te matua o ngā iwi tekau mā rua.
  • Hōhepa · i hokona e ōna tuākana engari i whakapikia ki te mana — “he pai ia tō te Atua whakaaro” (Kenehi 50:20).
epochs.next: I muri i a Hōhepa, ka heke te whānau ki Īhipa — ā, ka waiho hei pononga…

epochs.title: Te Putanga me te Koraha
epochs.date: c. 1446 i mua i a te Karaiti
epochs.one: I whakaorangia e te Atua he iwi pononga, ā, i meinga hei iwi māna.
epochs.events: Ngā whiu tekau, te Kapenga, te whitinga i te Moana Whero, ngā Ture Tekau i Hinai, te tāpenakara, ngā tau 40 i te koraha
epochs.q: Ā, ka tango ahau i a koutou hei iwi māku, ko ahau anō hei Atua mō koutou.
epochs.christ: Ko te Kapenga — i reira i whakatahuri te toto o te reme i te mate — e tohu ana ki a Īhu, “tā tātou reme o te Kapenga”, i rīpekatia mō tātou (1 Koriniti 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Ko te whakaoranga nui rawa o te Kawenata Tawhito. Ko Īharaira, i pononga i mua, ka whakaorangia e te kaha o te Atua, ā, ka meinga hei iwi māna.

  • Te Kapenga · ka tipokahia e te mate te whare i tohua ki te toto o te reme — te tauira o ngā patunga tapu katoa o muri mai.
  • Te Moana Whero · te whakaoranga i te wāhi kāhore he huarahi; ka waiho te “whitinga” hei tohu mō te tīmatanga hou.
  • Te kawenata o Hinai · mā ngā Ture ka ako rātou me pēhea te noho hei iwi mā te Atua.
  • Te tāpenakara · he wāhi tapu nekeneke e noho ai te Atua i waenga i tōna iwi — he matamatatanga o “Emanuera”.
  • Tau 40 · nā te tūtūtanga ka pōhēhē tētahi whakatupuranga i te koraha, heoi i noho tata tonu te Atua me te mana me te pou kapua me te pou ahi.
epochs.next: E tū ana i te tapa o te whenua i oatitia, ka takatū rātou ki te uru atu…

epochs.title: Te Riringa me ngā Kaiwhakawā
epochs.date: c. 1400–1050 i mua i a te Karaiti
epochs.one: I riro i a rātou te whenua, engari, kāhore he kīngi, ka mahi te katoa i tāna i pai ai.
epochs.people: A Hohua; ngā kaiwhakawā pērā i a Kiriona rāua ko Hamahona; a Rutu
epochs.events: Te hinganga o Heriko, te nohoanga i Kanaana, te huringa tukurua o te hara–whakawā–whakaora
epochs.q: I aua rā kāhore o Īharaira kīngi; ko tā rātou i mea ai ko ngā mea i tika ki te titiro a tēnei, a tēnei.
epochs.christ: Mai i te whakapaparanga o Rutu ka puta a Rāwiri, ā, mai i te whakapaparanga o Rāwiri ka puta a Īhu (Matiu 1). Ahakoa te raruraru, ka haere tonu te whakapapa o te Mīhaia.
epochs.detail:
I raro i a Hohua ka uru rātou ki te whenua i oatitia, engari i muri i te nohoanga ka wareware wawe rātou ki te Atua. Ko te pukapuka o ngā Kaiwhakawā ko taua huringa anō e tukurua ana.

  • Te huringa heke · hara → tūkinotanga → karanga → ka whakaora tētahi kaiwhakawā → hara anō. Ka kino kē atu.
  • Ngā kaiwhakawā · Kiriona, Hamahona, Tepora — he kaiwhakaora poto, he toa engari he tini ō rātou hapa.
  • Rutu · he kōrero mārama o te pono i te wā pōuri; ka uru tētahi wahine kē ki te whakapaparanga o Rāwiri (me Īhu).
epochs.next: Ka karanga te iwi, “Homai hoki he kīngi mō mātou!”…

epochs.title: Te Kīngitanga Kotahi
epochs.date: c. 1050–930 i mua i a te Karaiti
epochs.one: Ka oati te Atua ki a Rāwiri, “Ka mau tonu tōu torōna ake ake.”
epochs.events: Te kīngi tuatahi a Hāora, a Rāwiri rāua ko Koriata, te kawenata o Rāwiri, te hanganga o te temepara e Horomona
epochs.q: Ka tūturu tonu hoki tōu whare me tōu kīngitanga ā ake ake, ki tōu aroaro; ka mau tonu tōu torōna ā ake ake.’
epochs.christ: Ka tutuki te “torōna mau tonu” i roto i a Īhu, te tama a Rāwiri — koia i kīia ai ko te “Tama a Rāwiri” (Ruka 1:32-33; Matiu 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Te tihi o Īharaira, i raro i ngā kīngi tokotoru.

  • Hāora · te kīngi i tonoa e te iwi; he tīmatanga pai engari i pakaru i te tūtūtanga.
  • Rāwiri · “he tangata e rite ana ki te ngākau o te Atua”. Ka hinga a Koriata i a ia, ā, ka meinga a Hiruhārama hei tāone matua. Ka hara nui ia (Patehepa) engari ka ripeneta mai i te ngākau (Waiata 51).
  • Te kawenata o Rāwiri (2 Hamuera 7) · ka oati te Atua kia mau tonu te whakapaparanga o Rāwiri ake ake — te pakiaka matua o te tūmanako Mīhaia.
  • Horomona · i te tihi o te mōhio me te taonga ka hangaia e ia te temepara, engari i muri ka huri ki ngā whakapakoko.
epochs.next: I muri i a Horomona, ka wehe te kīngitanga kia rua…

epochs.title: Te Kīngitanga Wehe
epochs.date: 930–586 i mua i a te Karaiti
epochs.one: Wehea kia tonga (Hura) me te raki (Īharaira), ka heke te iwi ki te ngaromanga.
epochs.people: Ngā kīngi o ngā kīngitanga e rua; ngā poropiti pērā i a Iraia, Ihāia, Heremaia
epochs.events: Te wehenga o te kīngitanga, te horapatanga o te karakia whakapakoko, ngā whakatūpato a ngā poropiti
epochs.q: Nā, kua tahuri kē a Īharaira i te whare o Rāwiri ā taea noatia tēnei rā.
epochs.christ: I tēnei wā ka kaha ake te poropiti a ngā poropiti mō te Mīhaia e haere mai ana (Ihāia 9:6; Ihāia 53).
epochs.detail:
I ngā rā o te tama a Horomona ka wehe te iwi: te kīngitanga raki o Īharaira (iwi tekau, tāone matua Hamaria) me te kīngitanga tonga o Hura (iwi e rua, tāone matua Hiruhārama).

  • Īharaira (raki) · ka mahi ngā kīngi katoa ki ngā whakapakoko; ka hinga ki a Ahiria i te 722 i mua i a te Karaiti.
  • Hura (tonga) · ka haere tonu te whakapaparanga o Rāwiri, me ētahi kīngi pai pērā i a Hetekia me Hōhia, engari ka heke katoa.
  • Ngā poropiti · ka karanga a Iraia, Amohe, Ihāia, Heremaia, “hoki mai!” I konei tino nui ai te poropiti Mīhaia (te “pononga e mamae ana” o Ihāia 53).
epochs.next: I te mutunga ka tae mai te whakawā i tohua — ka kawea rātou ki te whakaraunga…

epochs.title: Te Whakaraunga
epochs.date: 722 / 586 i mua i a te Karaiti
epochs.one: Ka hinga te iwi, ā, ka toia ki ngā whenua kē.
epochs.events: Ka hinga a Īharaira ki a Ahiria (722), ka hinga a Hura ki a Papurona, ā, ka whakangaromia te temepara (586)
epochs.q: I te taha o ngā wai o Papurōna – noho ana tātou i reira, āe, tangi ana tātou, i a tātou i mahara ai ki Hiona.
epochs.christ: I te hōhonu o te pōuri ka oati a Heremaia i tētahi “kawenata hou” (Heremaia 31:31) — ko taua kawenata anō i hīritia e Īhu i te Hapa Whakamutunga.
epochs.detail:
Ka tutuki ngā whakatūpato. Ka wera te temepara, ā, ka kawea te iwi ki Papurona — ka ngaro te whenua, te kīngi, me te temepara: ko te wāhi heke rawa o ngā mea katoa.

  • E rua ngā hinganga · Īharaira (Ahiria, 722 i mua i a te Karaiti) me Hura (Papurona, 586 i mua i a te Karaiti).
  • Raniera · he tauira o te whakapono ahakoa i te marae etene (te rua raiona); ka kite ia i ngā kitenga o tētahi “kīngitanga mau tonu” e haere mai ana.
  • He kōrara o te tūmanako · ko te kitenga a Ehekiera o ngā wheua maroke e ora ana anō (Ehekiera 37) me te “kawenata hou” a Heremaia e tohu ana ki te ao mua i te pōuri.
epochs.next: E whitu tekau tau i muri mai, ka whakatuwheratia e te Atua te ara — ka hoki rātou ki te kāinga…

epochs.title: Te Hokinga Mai
epochs.date: 538–430 i mua i a te Karaiti
epochs.one: Ka hoki rātou, ā, ka hanga anō i te temepara me ngā taiepa.
epochs.events: Te hokinga mā te ture a Hairuha, te hanganga anō o te temepara, te whakahōnga o ngā taiepa o Hiruhārama, te whakaoranga o te Kupu
epochs.q: kei te koa hoki ki a Ihowā he kaha mō koutou.
epochs.christ: Ko Maraki, te pukapuka whakamutunga o te Kawenata Tawhito, ka mutu mā te poropiti i tētahi karere hei whakareri i te ara o te Mīhaia: “Tēnei te ungā atu nei e ahau tāku karere” (Maraki 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Mā te ture a Hairuha, te kīngi o Pāhia (538 i mua i a te Karaiti), ka tīmata te hokinga. I ngā ngaru e toru ka hoki mai, ka hanga anō i ngā mea i hinga.

  • Herupapera · ka hanga anō i te temepara (i oti i te 516 i mua i a te Karaiti).
  • Etera · ka ako anō i te Kupu, ā, ka whakaora i te whakapono.
  • Nehemia · ka hanga anō i ngā taiepa o Hiruhārama i ngā rā e 52.
  • Ehetere · ka whakaora i ngā Hūrai i Pāhia i te whakangaromanga — “mō tēnei wā tonu”.
  • E hiakai tonu ana · e tū ana te temepara, engari kāhore he kīngi pērā i a Rāwiri. E tatari ana te iwi ki te Mīhaia.
epochs.next: Ā, i muri mai… me te mea kua noho puku te rangi, ka pahemo ngā tau 400.

epochs.tag: I WAENGA I NGĀ KAWENATA · TE WHAKARITE WHĀRANGI
epochs.title: Ngā Tau Puku
epochs.date: c. 430–4 i mua i a te Karaiti
epochs.one: 400 tau kāhore he reo poropiti — heoi i āta whakaritea te whārangi.
epochs.people: A Aramita Nui, ngā Makapi, a Roma
epochs.events: Pāhia → Kariki → te mana motuhake Makapi → te mana o Roma
epochs.q: Ā, nō ka tutuki te tāima, ka tonoa mai e te Atua tāna Tama, i whānau i te wahine,
epochs.christ: Ko tēnei “whakarite whārangi” katoa he mahi nā te Atua kia haere mai ai a Īhu i te wā tika tonu “i te tutukinga o te wā”.
epochs.detail:
Mai i a Maraki ki te Kawenata Hou, e 400 tau pea kāhore he kupu hou o te karaipiture. Heoi i muri i te hītori e whakareri ana te Atua i te ara mō te rongopai.

  • Ka huri ngā emepaea · Pāhia → Kariki (Aramita, 333 i mua i a te Karaiti) → ngā Pātoremi me ngā Hēreuki → te whakaohooho Makapi (167 i mua i a te Karaiti) → Roma (63 i mua i a te Karaiti).
  • Te reo Kariki · nā ngā riringa a Aramita ka noho te reo Kariki hei reo noa; ka whakamāoritia te Kawenata Tawhito ki te reo Kariki (te Hepetuaginta), e whakawātea ana i te ara kia hora wawe te rongopai.
  • Ngā huarahi me te rangimārie o Roma · ka noho ngā huarahi pai me te “Pax Romana” hei ara mō te mihana.
  • Ngā hīnakoka me ngā rōpū · ka mau te whakaakoranga hīnakoka; ka puta ngā Parihi me ngā Haruki; ā, ka maoa te tūmanako ki te Mīhaia.
epochs.next: Kātahi ka pakaru te puku — i te mutunga, ka tae mai ia.

epochs.title: Ka Tae Mai a Īhu
epochs.date: c. 4 i mua i a te Karaiti–30 AD
epochs.one: Ka tae mai te Mīhaia i oatitia, ka mate, ā, ka ara anō.
epochs.people: A Īhu, ngā ākonga tekau mā rua, a Hoani Kaiiriiri
epochs.events: Te whakatangatatanga, tāna minitatanga me ana whakaakoranga me ana merekara, te mate i te rīpeka, te aranga i te rā tuatoru
epochs.q: I whakakikokikotia te Kupu, ā, noho ana i a mātou… kī tonu i te aroha noa, i te pono.
epochs.christ: Ko te uri o te wahine (whārangi 2), te manaaki o Āperahama (3), te reme o te Kapenga (4), te kīngi mau tonu o Rāwiri (6), te kawenata hou (8) — ka tutuki katoa i te tangata kotahi, i a Īhu: tō tātou Poropiti pono, Tohunga pono, me Kīngi pono.
epochs.detail:
Ka pakaru te puku; ka tae mai te Mea i Oatitia. Ka whakaatu ngā Rongopai e whā i te oranga, te matenga, me te aranga o Īhu mai i ngā kokonga e whā.

  • Whakatangatatanga · ka noho tangata te Atua (Emanuera, “Te Atua ki a tātou”), i te wāhi iti o Petereheme.
  • Minitatanga · ka ako ia i te rangatiratanga o te Atua, ka whakaora i te hunga māuiui, ka karanga i te hunga hara. “Ko ia kua kite i ahau, kua kite i te Matua.”
  • Te rīpeka · ka utu ia i te utu o te hara me te mate i pā mai i te Hinganga (whārangi 2). Te reme pono o te Kapenga.
  • Aranga · ka ara ake i te rā tuatoru, ka wāhi ia i te mana o te hara, o te mate, me Hātana — i te rīpeka kē ia i “pāuhua ake e ia ki raro ngā rangatiratanga me ngā mana, whakakitea nuitia ana e ia” (Korohe 2:15).

Nā reira ko Īhu tō tātou Poropiti pono (e whakaatu ana i te ara ki te Atua), tō tātou Tohunga pono (e whakamārie ana i te hara ki tōna tinana ake), me tō tātou Kīngi pono (e hinga ana i te hara, te mate, me Hātana, ā, e kīngi ana ake ake).
epochs.next: Ka tonoa e Īhu kua ara ana ākonga ki te ao…

epochs.title: Ka Tīmata te Hāhi
epochs.one: Ka tae mai te Wairua, ā, ka hora te rongopai ki ngā pito o te whenua.
epochs.people: A Pita, Paora, te hāhi tuatahi
epochs.events: Te ringihanga o te Wairua i te Petekoha, te whānautanga o te hāhi, te horapatanga o te rongopai mai i Hiruhārama ki Roma mā te whakatoinga
epochs.q: ka riro he kaha i a koutou, ina haere mai te Wairua Tapu ki runga ki a koutou… ā tae noa ki te pito whakamutunga o te ao.
epochs.christ: E haere tonu ana tēnei kōrero. Ka mutu te Paipera mā te oati ka hoki mai a Īhu, ā, ka meinga e ia ngā mea katoa hei mea hou (Whakakitenga 21).
epochs.detail:
I muri i te kakenga o Īhu, ka tae mai te Wairua i oatitia i te Petekoha, ā, ka whānau te hāhi. Ka hora pahūhū te rongopai.

  • Petekoha · ka huri te Wairua i ngā ākonga māharahara hei kaiwhakaatu māia.
  • Pita · ka kauwhau i te rongopai ki ngā Hūrai i Hiruhārama.
  • Paora · mai i te kaiwhakatoi ki te āpotoro, ka whakatō hāhi puta noa i te ao Tauiwi, ā, ka tuhi i ngā pukapuka.
  • Ki ngā pito o te whenua · Hiruhārama → Hūria → Hamaria → Roma. Ka tutuki te oati ki a Āperahama mō “ngā iwi katoa”.
  • Me tātou · kāhore te kōrero e mutu; e ahu tonu ana ki te hokinga mai o Īhu me te rangi hou me te whenua hou.
epochs.next: Engari kāhore te kōrero e mutu i konei…

epochs.title: Te Whakahōnga
epochs.one: Ka hoki mai a Īhu, ā, ka meinga e ia ngā mea katoa hei mea hou.
epochs.people: A Īhu e hoki mai ana; ngā iwi katoa
epochs.events: Te hokinga tuarua, te whakawā whakamutunga, te mutunga o te hara·te mate·ngā roimata, te rangi hou me te whenua hou
epochs.q: Ka murua hoki e ia ngā roimata katoa i ō rātou kanohi; ā, kore ake he mate; kāhore hoki he auē, kāhore he tangi, kāhore he mamae,
epochs.christ: Ka whakahōngia i te mutunga te Erene o te hanganga tuatahi hei “Hiruhārama Hou”. Ka noho te Atua me tōna iwi ake ake — te tutukinga o Emanuera (Whakakitenga 21:3; Matiu 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Kāhore te Paipera e mutu i te wā o te hāhi. Ko tōna pukapuka whakamutunga, te Whakakitenga, e whakaatu ana i a Īhu e hoki mai ana ki te whakaoti i ngā mea katoa.

  • Te hokinga tuarua · ka hoki mai te kīngi i oatitia i runga i te korōria.
  • Te wikitōria whakamutunga · ka hinga a Hātana me te mate ake ake, ā, ka kīngi a te Karaiti hei Kīngi o ngā kīngi (1 Koriniti 15:25-26; Whakakitenga 20:10).
  • Te whakawā me te aranga · ka whakatikahia ngā hē katoa, ā, ka ara ake te hunga mate.
  • He rangi hou me he whenua hou · ka ngaro ake ake te hara, te mate, ngā roimata, me te mamae (Whakakitenga 21:4).
  • Te Erene kua whakahōngia · i tētahi “Hiruhārama Hou” pai ake i te tīmatanga, ka noho te Atua me tōna iwi ake ake — te wāhi e ahu atu ana te Paipera katoa.

Nā reira ko te wā tēnei o te “kua oti, engari kāore anō kia tino oti”: i roto i a Īhu kua oti te whakaoranga, engari kāore anō kia tutuki katoa.
epochs.next: Nā, he aha te tikanga o tēnei kōrero katoa mō “au”?

core.title: Te hara taketake — kāhore he tangata tika
core.body: Ehara te raru i te “ētahi mahi kino noa”, engari ko te pakiaka o te ngākau. Mai i a Arama, ka whānau te katoa i raro i te hara, ā, e kore e taea e rātou anake te tae ki te Atua.
core.vtext: Kāhore he tangata tika, kāhore kia kotahi… Kua peka kē rātou katoa, kua kino ngātahi; kāhore he tangata e mahi ana i te pai, kāhore rawa kia kotahi… kua hara katoa hoki, ā, kāhore e taea e rātou te korōria o te Atua;

core.title: E kore te ture e taea te whakaora i au
core.body: Ehara te ture i te arawhata, engari he whakaata. Ko te kaha o tāku whakapau kaha, ko te nui o tāna whakaatu i tōku hapa. Ko tōna kaupapa kia ārahi i a tātou ki a te Karaiti.
core.vtext: mā roto mai i te ture te mātauranga ki te hara… kua meinga nei te ture hei kaiwhakaako mō tātou, hei ārahi ki a te Karaiti,

core.title: Mā te aroha noa — he koha, ehara i te whakapau kaha
core.body: Ehara te whakaoranga i te utu mō ngā mahi pai i mahia e koe, engari he koha kore utu mō te hunga kāhore e tika kia whiwhi. Nā reira e kore e taea e tētahi te whakamanamana.
core.vtext: Nā te aroha noa hoki koutou i whakaorangia ai i runga i te whakapono… Ehara i ngā mahi, kei whakamanamana te tangata.

core.title: Ka tika mā te whakapono
core.body: Ehara i te pupuri i te ture, engari mā te whakapono ki a Īhu Karaiti, ka kīia koe he tika — kāhore e kākahungia ki tōu ake tika, engari ki tōna tika.
core.vtext: i te mea ka tika nei i te whakapono… ehara ngā mahi a te ture i te mea e tika ai te tangata, engari ko te whakapono ki a Īhu Karaiti;

core.title: E tohu ana te Paipera ki a Īhu
core.body: Ehara te Paipera i te pukapuka mō ngā tāngata nui, i te pukapuka āwhina-whaiaro rānei. Mai i a Kenehi ki a Whakakitenga, e whakaatu ana ia whārangi i te tangata kotahi — a Īhu Karaiti.
core.vtext: ko ēnei hei kaiwhakaatu mōku… ka tīmata ia ki tā Mohi, ki tā ngā poropiti katoa, whakaaturia ana ki a rāua ngā mea mōna o ngā karaipiture katoa.

core.title: Te rangatiratanga o te Atua — te kōrero matua a Īhu
core.body: Ko te kaupapa i tino akona e Īhu. Ka uru mai te rangatiratanga o te Atua hei kīngi ki tēnei ao i a Īhu, ā, ka tutuki i tōna hokinga mai. Mā tōna rīpeka me tōna aranga, ko Īhu te Kīngi pono i hinga ai te hara, te mate, me Hātana.
core.vtext: Kua rite tēnei te wā, kua tata hoki te rangatiratanga o te Atua; rīpenetā, whakaponohia te rongopai.

core.title: Te rongopai — kua oti katoa i a ia
core.body: Ko te utu o te hara e kore e taea e au te utu, i utua e Īhu i tōku tūnga i te rīpeka, ā, mā tōna aranga ka hinga te mate. E kore au e okioki ki te “mahia tēnei”, engari ki te “kua oti”.
core.vtext: Kua oti… i a tātou anō e hara ana, ka mate a te Karaiti mō tātou.

mis.w: “He aha i hangaia ai e te Atua he tangata ka taea te hara? Kāhore kē rānei i pai ake te kore noa i a tātou?”
mis.t: I hangaia e te Atua te ao me te tangata ehara i te ngoikoretanga, engari nā te aroha e rere ana. Ko te hanga i te tangata hei tangata e hono ana ki te Atua he aroha tonu. Ā, ko te urunga mai o te hara kāhore i waho o te mahere whakaora a te Atua (Epeha 1:4-5). Ehara te whārangi tuatahi o te Paipera i te whakawā, engari he aroha.

mis.w: “He peinga atu me te mate mō te kainga noa i te hua kotahi — kāhore rānei te Atua i tino taikaha rawa?”
mis.t: Ko te peinga atu i Erene he whakawā, he atawhai anō hoki. Ko te kai i te rākau o te ora, kia ora tonu i taua āhua pakaru, motu i te Atua, he noho mau tonu i te mamae ake ake (Kenehi 3:22). Nā te tuku i te mate ka whakatuwheratia te ara hoki mai, ā, i reira tonu ka oati te Atua i tētahi Kaiwhakaora (Kenehi 3:15). I roto kē i te whakawā te aroha.

mis.w: “I kōwhiria a Āperahama nā tōna whakapono nui — kāhore rānei ngā tāngata katoa o te Paipera he toa whakaaro nui?”
mis.t: I teka, i ruarua hoki a Āperahama; he tangata tinihanga a Hākopa. Kāhore te Atua i karanga i te hunga “tika”, engari i te hunga hapa, mā te aroha noa. Ehara te take i tō rātou pai, engari ko te aroha pono o te Atua (Tiuteronomi 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Ehara rānei te ture (ngā ture tekau) i te whakamātautau me paahi e koe kia whakaorangia ai?”
mis.t: I whakaora te Atua i a rātou i mua i te homaitanga o te ture. Ka tīmata ngā Ture Tekau ki te kī o te whakaoranga: “Ko Ihowā ahau, ko tōu Atua, nāku koe i whakaputa mai i te whenua o Īhipa” (Ekoruhe 20:2). Ehara te ture i te “pupuri kia whakaorangia”, engari he ārahi aroha mō te āhua o te noho a te iwi kua whakaorangia kē (Tiuteronomi 7:7-9). Ko te aroha noa tuatahi tonu; ko te ngohengohe te whakautu.

mis.w: “He patunga atawhaikore te riringa o Kanaana — nā reira he atua nanakia te Atua o te Kawenata Tawhito.”
mis.t: He kaupapa uaua tēnei e kore e taea te whakatau i te rerenga kotahi. Engari e whakaatu ana te Paipera ehara i te tūkino noa, engari he whakawā i muri i ngā rautau o te manawanui ki te kino tino nui (tae atu ki te patu tamariki) (Kenehi 15:16; Tiuteronomi 9:4-5; Rewitikuha 18:24-25). He pōturi te Atua ki te whakawā, ā, i koa ia ki te manaaki i te hunga i huri ki a ia — ahakoa ngā tauiwi pērā i a Rahapa rāua ko Rutu (Hohua 6:25; Rutu 4:13-17).

mis.w: “He toa kāhore ōna hapa a Rāwiri — koia i kīia ai ‘he tangata e rite ana ki te ngākau o te Atua’.”
mis.t: I puremu a Rāwiri, i kōhuru anō hoki. Ko “te tangata e rite ana ki te ngākau o te Atua” ehara i te kore hapa, engari ko te tangata kāhore i huna i tōna hara — i tino ripeneta, ā, i hoki tonu ki te Atua (Waiata 51). E kore te aroha o te Atua e whakarere i te hunga e tino hinga ana.

mis.w: “He kaimatakite ngā poropiti e matapae ana i te āpōpō / he riri anake te Atua o te Kawenata Tawhito.”
mis.t: Ehara te ngākau o te poropiti i te “matapae i te āpōpō”, engari ko te tangi mamae a te Atua: “Tēnā, hoki mai.” Ahakoa ngā whakatūpato o te whakawā, ehara te whāinga i te whakangaro, engari kia huri mai te tangata, kia ora — “kāhore ōku ngākau koa ki te matenga o te tangata kino” (Ehekiera 33:11).

mis.w: “E whakaatu ana te whakaraunga kua tino whakarerea e te Atua a Īharaira.”
mis.t: Ehara te whakaraunga i te whakarerenga, engari he whakatikatika me te whakapaipai i tētahi tamaiti aroha (Ngā Hiperu 12:6). Kāhore te Atua i wehe; i noho ia me Raniera i te puku o te whakaraunga, ā, i oati: “Kei te mōhio hoki ahau ki ngā whakaaro e whakaaro nei ahau ki a koutou… he whakaaro mō te rongo mau, ehara mō te kino, kia hoatu he tūmanako ki a koutou” (Heremaia 29:11).

mis.w: “Kāhore he kupu mō ngā tau 400, nā reira kua wehe te Atua, e okioki ana rānei.”
mis.t: Ehara te puku i te kore. Kāhore noa ia i kōrero, i a ia e neke ana i ngā emepaea, ngā reo, me ngā huarahi ki te whakareri i te whārangi mō te whakaoranga. I te wā tino puku, e tino mahi kaha ana te Atua, mā te aroha (Karatia 4:4).

mis.w: “He kaiwhakaako pai noa iho a Īhu / he hinganga pōuri te rīpeka.”
mis.t: I kī a Īhu ko te Atua tonu ia (Hoani 8:58), ā, ehara te rīpeka i te pohehe, i te hinganga rānei, engari he aroha i whakaritea. Kāhore ia i toia ki reira mā te kaha; i tuku ia i tōna ake oranga (Hoani 10:18). “Kāhore he aroha o tētahi i rahi ake i tēnei, arā, kia tuku te tangata i a ia anō kia mate mō ōna hoa” (Hoani 15:13).

mis.w: “He karapu o te hunga tino pai te hāhi, he whare noa rānei.”
mis.t: Ehara te hāhi i te whakaminenga o te “hunga tapu kua oti”, engari o te hunga hara kua murua. Tae atu ki te āpotoro a Paora i kī ia ko ia “te tino tangata hara” (1 Timoti 1:15). I tautohe, i hinga anō hoki te hāhi tuatahi (Ngā Mahi 6:1; 1 Koriniti 1:11). Ehara i te wāhi hei whakamanamana, engari he tāngata e tuku ana i te aroha i whiwhi rātou (Hoani 13:34-35).

love: Kāhore te kōrero e tīmata ki te whakawā, engari ki te hanganga i ringihia mā te aroha.
I te wā tonu i hara ai te tangata, ka oati te Atua i te whakaoranga i reira tonu.
Ka haere tuatahi te Atua ki tētahi tangata kāhore i tika, ka karanga i a ia mā tōna ingoa, ā, ka meinga hei awa manaaki.
Ka rongo ia i te aue o te iwi pononga, ā, ka heke iho ia anō ki te whakaora i a rātou.
Ahakoa i tinihangatia ia tukurua, ko ia karangatanga ka tonoa e ia tētahi kaiwhakaora, ā, ka whakaarahia anō rātou.
Kāhore ia i whakarere i a Rāwiri kua hinga; mā runga i a ia ka oati ia i tētahi Kīngi mau tonu.
Ki te iwi i tahuri ke, ka tonoa tonutia e ia ngā poropiti, e tangi ana, “Tēnā, hoki mai.”
Tae atu ki te whenua tino pōuri o te whakaraunga, i heke tahi ia me rātou, ā, ka oati i te whakahōnga.
Ahakoa te iwi i hinga tukurua, kāhore ia i tango i tāna oati.
Ahakoa i ngā tau puku 400, i muna, e whakareri ana ia i te ara o te whakaoranga.
I a tātou anō e hara ana, ka tonoa e ia tāna Tama ki te tuku i tōna ake oranga.
Ko te aroha i whiwhi mātou, ka tonoa e ia ināianei kia rere ki te ao katoa.
I te mutunga ka murua e ia ngā roimata katoa, ā, ka whakahōngia ngā mea katoa mā te aroha.

s.ui.footer: Te Paipera i te Panui Kotahi · Ngā kupu Karaipiture mai i te Paipera Tapu
s.hero.kicker: MAI I TE HANGANGA KI TE HĀHI
s.hero.title:
Te Paipera,
i te panui kotahi
s.hero.sub: I te panui kotahi, kitea te kōrero nui o te Paipera — me te take i haere mai ai a Īhu.
s.thread.eyebrow: KOTAHI TE RERENGA E HONO ANA I NGĀ MEA KATOA
s.thread.h2: I te mutunga, he kōrero kotahi anake te Paipera
s.thread.note: Ka oati te Atua (te kawenata), ka tatari roa te iwi, ā, i te mutunga ka tutuki me te whakaoti i ngā mea katoa i roto i a Īhu. Whāia ngā whakaaturanga 13 i raro nei i tērā rerenga — pāwhiritia “Pānui atu” i ia kāri mō te kōrero hōhonu.
s.gospel.eyebrow: TE TIKANGA O TĒNEI KŌRERO MŌ “AU”
s.gospel.h2: Te tino ngako o te Paipera
s.gospel.lead: Ehara te Paipera i te pukapuka ako “me noho pai koe”.
s.gospel.sublead: He kōrero tēnei mō te whakaoranga a te Atua, mā te aroha noa anake, i te hunga hara e kore e taea te whakaora i a rātou anō. Kei te pokapū ko Īhu Karaiti.
s.gospel.mirror:
Ko te huringa mutungakore o Īharaira he whakaata pono o “au”

Karakia whakapakoko→Mamae→Karanga→Ka whakaora te Atua→Karakia whakapakoko anō…

Mai i ngā Kaiwhakawā ki te whakaraunga, ka tukurua e Īharaira tēnei huringa mutungakore. Kāhore te Paipera i tuhi i tēnei kia tāwai tātou, “Anō te pōrahurahu o rātou.”

He whakaata tēnei. Ehara te tino kaupapa i te “i pērā rātou” engari kia kite tātou “ka pērā anō au” (1 Koriniti 10:11).

Ehara te whakapakoko i te whakapakoko whakairo anake. Ko ngā mea katoa e arohaina, e whakawhirinakihia ranei e tātou nui atu i te Atua — te moni, te angitu, te whakaaetanga, te tangata, tae atu ki au anō. Ā, ko te whakamahi i te Atua hei taputapu kia tutuki ai aku hiahia he karakia whakapakoko anō.

I te mutunga, ko te whakapakoko hōhonu rawa ko “au anō, e noho ana i te torōna o te Atua”.
s.gospel.coreIntro: Nā, me pēhea e whakaorangia ai e te Atua tērā tangata hara? Anei te ngako o te rongopai e kauwhautia ana e te Paipera.
s.gospel.crux:
E tohu ana te Paipera katoa ki te wāhi kotahi.

Kāhore i taea e te tangata anake te wāhi i te huringa o te hara, ā, kāhore he tangata tika. Nā reira me utu e tētahi te utu i tō rātou tūnga.

Kāhore a Īhu i haere mai ki te tuku whakaakoranga pai anake. Kāhore he ara kē hei whakaora i a au, nā reira me haere mai tonu ia.

Ko te tangata i tika kia iri i taua rīpeka ko au.
I mau a Īhu i tōku hara, ā, i ripekatia ki reira i tōku tūnga.

“Kāhore, i werohia ia mō ō tātou hē, i kurua mō ō tātou kino… kei ōna kārawarawa hoki he rongoā mō tātou.” — Ihāia 53:5
s.faq.h: He mea tonu e raruraru ana koe?
s.faq.q1: ▸ Nā, ka whakapono noa te kaikōhuru ā ka tae ki te rangi, engari ko te tangata pai i tōna oranga katoa kāhore e whakapono ka tae ki te reinga?
s.faq.a1:
He pātai tika. Engari e rua ngā pohehe kei roto.

① Kāhore te Paipera e wehe i te tangata kia “pai me te kino”. Ehara te ine i te “pai ake i tērā atu” engari ko “te tapu tino o te Atua”. I tōna aroaro, kāhore tētahi e “pai rawa” (Rōma 3:23). Nā reira ehara tēnei i te “tangata pai me te kaikōhuru”, engari he rite ki te tokorua e māuiui ana i te mate mōrearea kotahi — ka tango tētahi i te rongoā, ka whakakāhore tētahi, e kī ana, “He hauora ake au i tērā tangata.”

② Kotahi anake te mea e wehe ana i te rangi me te reinga. Ehara te kaute o ngā mahi, engari mēnā kua manako koe ki a Īhu Karaiti hei Ariki, ā, kua whakatauhia tō raru o te hara. Ko te tangata kua oti tōna hara i te toto o te Karaiti ka tae ki te rangi; ko te tangata kāhore i manako ki a ia, e mau tonu ana tōna hara, kāhore. Kāhore he nui o ngā mahi pai e taea ai te whakatau i taua raru o te hara.

Nā reira ehara te rangi me te reinga i te “taonga mō ngā mahi pai”, engari he take mō te hononga ki a te Karaiti. Ā, ko te “whakapono” ehara i te whakaae hinengaro engari he huringa o te tangata e whakahaere ana i tōu oranga — ko te tangata kua tino manako ki a ia kāhore e whakahīhī, engari ka tino ripeneta. Inā, ko te whakatika-whaiaro (“he tangata pai au”) te whakapakoko uaua rawa ki te wāhi, e whakaaro ai tātou kāhore he hiahia mō te Karaiti (Ruka 18:9-14).

E kī mārama ana te Paipera: “Ko ia e whakapono ana ki a ia, e kore e tau te hē ki a ia; tēnā ko ia e kore e whakapono, kua whakahēngia noatia ake” (Hoani 3:18). Ehara te whakawā i te “kaute i ō mahi i muri i tōu mate”, engari kua whakatauhia kē mā te manako rānei koe ki a te Karaiti.

Rōma 3:23 · Hoani 3:18 · Epeha 2:8-9 · Ruka 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Kāhore rānei e taea e au te noho pai noa me te kore whakapono ki a Īhu?
s.faq.a2:
Koia te whakaaro tino noa, engari kua pohehe mō te tino raru. Anei he whakaahua.

Whakaarohia kei runga koe i te kaipuke kaihao. Ahakoa pēhea te mā o tāu pupuri i te papa, te atawhai ki te kaihautū, te tauira pai o tōu oranga — he kaihao tonu koe, nā te mea e kawea ana koe e te kaipuke ki tōna wāhi (te tāone o te whakawā). Ehara te raru i te “kaute o ngā mahi” engari ko “te kaipuke nōu” (tō tuakiri).

Nā reira ehara te rongopai i te “whakapau kaha kia pai ake”, engari ko “huri kaipuke”. Heke mai i te kaipuke o te hara, ā, whiti ki a Īhu — ki te tuakiri hou o te tamaiti a te Atua. Ehara tēnei i te whakapiki i tō kaute mā te kaha, engari ko te whakawhirinaki ki a Ia e tuku ana i tōna ringa, ā, te whiti ki tōna kaipuke.

Inā hoki, e whakaatu ana te Paipera i te whakaoranga ko tēnei tonu whitinga — “Nāna nei tātou i whakaora mai i te kaha o te pōuri, ā, whakawhitia ake tātou e ia ki te rangatiratanga o tāna Tama aroha” (Korohe 1:13).

Kaua e pohehe: ehara tēnei i te kī he kore tikanga te oranga pai. Ehara te pai i te “tikanga” o te whakaoranga, engari ko tōna hua. Ko te tangata kua huri kaipuke ka noho pai ināianei ehara i te wehi, engari mā te aroha o te tamaiti.

Korohe 1:13 · Hoani 1:12 · Hoani 3:3 · Epeha 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Mēnā e noho rangimārie ana te kaihara, e kī ana “Kua murua au e te Atua”, engari e mamae tonu ana te tangata i whara — ehara rānei te aroha noa i te mea iti rawa te utu?
s.faq.a3:
He tika te pātai, ā, he pono te mamae. Engari ehara taua kī i te “murunga a te Paipera” — he whakawiri kē mōna.

① Kāhore te murunga a te Atua e iti te utu. Kāhore te hara e tāmia me te mea kāhore i tupu; nā te Atua tonu i utu tōna utu ki te oranga o tāna Tama. Ehara te rīpeka i te whakaaturanga he māmā te hara, engari he taumaha rawa — ko te murunga utu nui rawa o te ao.

② Ka hua te ripeneta pono. Mēnā e whakahīhī ana te kaihara ki te aroaro o te tangata i whara — “Kua murua au e te Atua, nā reira e noho rangimārie ana au” — ehara tērā i te ripeneta engari he whakatauira noa (Matiu 3:8). Ā, ko te murunga i waenga i te tangata me te Atua kāhore e muku i te whara o te tangata i mamae, kāhore hoki e akiaki kia murua e ia.

③ Kāhore te hara e “waiho noa”. Ka utua ia hara ki tētahi o ngā wāhi e rua — mā te Karaiti rānei e mau ki te rīpeka (mō te hunga e whakapono ana ki a ia kāhore he whakahēnga, Rōma 8:1), mā te tangata rānei e tino whakakāhore ana ki a ia e mau ake. Nā reira kāhore he “murunga utu iti”. E mau tonu ana hoki te kaihara i te kawenga ā-ture o tēnei ao (Rōma 13:1-4).

④ Kāhore ngā roimata o te tangata i whara e iti ki te Atua. Ka tangi tahi te Atua me te hunga e tangi ana, ka mahara ki ia roimata, ā, ka murua e ia anō i te mutunga (Whakakitenga 21:4). Nā reira kāhore te tangata i whara e mau kotahi i te taumaha o te rapu utu, engari ka taea te tuku ki te Atua tika (Rōma 12:19 — “Māku te rapu utu; māku te hoatu utu… e ai tā te Ariki”).

Matiu 3:8 · Rōma 8:1 · Rōma 13:1-4 · Whakakitenga 21:4
s.respond.sub: Ehara tēnei aroha i te mōhiohio engari he karanga. Mēnā kua pā te aroha i ripekatia i tōu tūnga ki tōu ngākau, inoia tēnei kia āta haere, kotahi rerenga i te wā.
s.respond.prayer:
E te Atua,

e whāki ana au he tangata hara au e kore e taea te whakaora i a au anō.

E whakapono ana au i mate a Īhu i te rīpeka mōku, ā, i ara anō.

Tēnā, murua aku hara katoa, ā, mai i tēnei wā kia koe te Ariki o tōku oranga.

Manakohia au hei tamaiti māu, ā, kia ora au i te oranga hou.

I runga i te ingoa o Īhu au e inoi nei. Āmine.
s.respond.after: Mēnā i inoi koe i tēnei mā te ngākau pono, e kī ana te Paipera kua meinga koe hei tamaiti mā te Atua. Kāhore koe i te mokemoke ināianei — kimihia tētahi hāhi tata, ā, hāere tahi i te ara o te whakapono.
s.respond.read: Pānuitia te Paipera mōu ake — tīmata i a Hoani
s.respond.verse: “Tēnā ko te hunga i manako ki a ia i tukua e ia ki a rātou ngā tikanga e meinga ai rātou hei tamariki mā te Atua.” — Hoani 1:12 · Rōma 10:9-10
s.closing.main:
Kotahi te Atua,
mā te kōrero kotahi,
e whai mai ana i a tātou mā te
aroha e kore e mutu.
s.closing.verse: “e kore te mate, te ora rānei… e kore tētahi atu mea hangā, e kaha ki te momotu i a tātou i te aroha o te Atua, i tērā i roto nei i a Karaiti Īhu, i tō tātou Ariki.” — Rōma 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
I runga i tēnei kōrero, ka tāpiritia e te Ture, ngā Waiata, ngā Poropiti, me ngā Pukapuka te “kikokiko”.
Ināianei, ahakoa te pukapuka e whakatuwheratia ana e koe, ka kite koe kei hea koe i te kōrero.
s.about.line: I ahu mai i te tirohanga hītori-whakaora e tohaina ana e te nuinga o te hāhi Pōrotetani Korea (whakaako-rongopai · whakahōu).
s.about.contact: Pātai · whakaaro — Tukua he īmēra
